svg.title: AI Agent FM favicon — monochrome slit reduction
svg.desc: One-ink cone with transparent slits: a single ink path using fill-rule evenodd, following the mark-mono.svg construction. Favicon-specific deviation, per the spec's small-size rule ("bands merged to three" below 48 px): the four canonical 22-unit slits are merged to three 80-unit slits centered at y = 365, 535, 705, because the canonical four-slit rhythm aliases to gray at 16 px. Slit subpaths are pre-intersected with the inner clip path, so their slanted left/right edges follow the inner cone sides; the slits are transparent (the page shows through) rather than ivory-filled.
